title: Pipeline crate and compiler services split

source.subject: Compiler: array type lowering, services split, pipeline crate, rustdoc sweep, Mod SDK regen.

body:
## Outcome

Array type lowering, services split, pipeline crate, rustdoc sweep, Mod SDK regen.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **Platform-spec cutover** (`v02-platform-spec-cutover`).

## Provenance
